description: Perform an audit of mailing list subscriptions in your inbox. Identify at least two distinct mailing lists to unsubscribe from based on email headers or content. Create a folder named 'Unsubscribe' and move at least eight emails from these identified lists into it. Draft unsubscribe emails for each list addressed to their respective administrative or request addresses found in the headers or footers. Draft a notification email to 'it-admin@techcorp.org' with the subject 'Unsubscribe Audit' listing the specific mailing lists you are leaving.
